en: A: What is your name?

ab: ralu’ mu ga Lawsing na Yangah.

en: A: Who are you?

ab: ulaqi’ kuwing ni Payan, ralu’ mu ga Hayung.
en: I’m Payan’s son, my name is Hayung.
A: Who are you?

ab: Sayun a ralu’ mu, pasibaqan kuwing ni papasibaq Tayax.
en: B: My name is Sayun and I’m a student at Tayax.
A: How is mom and dad?

ch: B:爸爸媽媽都很平安健康，謝謝您！
en: B: Mom and Dad are safe and healthy, thank you!
A: What’s your father’s name?

ab: Baay na Payan ralu’ ni yaba’ mu.
en: B: My father’s name is Baay.
A: Who is he?
He’s Hayung.

ab: yulah mu ihya’, Bawnay ku ralu’ niya’.
en: B: He’s my brother, his name is Bawnay.
A: What’s his name?
B: His name is Mayngus.
A: Was his name Mayngus?
B: Yes, his name is Mayngus.
A: Was his name Mayngus?
B:No, his name is Mawna’.
A: Who is that guy?

ab: hiya’ ga Kawban, yata’ mu ihya’.
en: B: She’s Kawban. she’s my aunt.
A: Who is that guy?

ab: ihya’ ga rawin mu, ralu’ niya’ ga Bagan.
ch: B:她是我的朋友，她的名字是Bagan。
en: B:She’s a friend of mine, her name is Bagan.

ab: piya’ a kaal su’ ka hani?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: magalpuw a kaal mu ka hani.
en: B: I am 10 years old.

ab: piya’ a kaal niya’ ka hani la?
en: A: How old is he?

ab: magalpuw cu rusa’ a kaal niya’ ka hani.
en: B: He is 12 years old.

ab: piya’ a kaal ni yaba’ su’ ka hani?
en: A: How old is your father?

ab: maymal kaal ni yaba’ mu ka hani.
en: B: My father is 50 years old.
A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: kiya a caxa’ yulah mu, caxa’ iyah, ru’ caxa’ ku suwayi’ mu na kanayril.
ch: B:我有一個哥哥，一個姊姊，和一個妹妹。
en: B: I have a brother, a sister, and a younger sister.
A: Do you have a brother?
B: I don’t have a brother.

ab: papiya’ cimu ka qutux cu imuwag?
en: A: How many people are in your family?

ab: saspat cami ka qutux cu imuwag.
en: B: There are four of us in our family.
A: Where did you study?

ab: kiya kuwing mateq i papatiqan Tabilas.
en: B: I went to primary school in Wenshui.
